entries.implementation_notes: Aligned empty and error states and kept the active goals shell in ContentView; updated state copy and transitions in goal detail flows; captured regression checks in GoalDashboardNavigationContractTests.
entries.forbidden_change_check: No new goals navigation architecture; no macOS split-view redesign.

entries.implementation_notes: Updated recovery handling and row readability for user-facing amount lines; preserved action hierarchy and existing row rhythm.
entries.forbidden_change_check: No broad rewrite of shared planning components beyond touched states.

entries.implementation_notes: Removed completion-side effects from recoverable failure path; goal creation success/failure and retry are handled via state object that preserves template/profile step context.
entries.forbidden_change_check: No new onboarding persistence model; no skip-path removal.

entries.source_section: Settings shell ordering and Family Access entrypoint
entries.implementation_notes: Kept Settings as the user-facing shell and kept Family Access before Local Bridge Sync; clarified sync copy and enabled explicit invite/retry semantics via family sharing model copy contracts.
entries.forbidden_change_check: No Local Bridge Sync runtime semantic change.
